channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: FIFA prepares to give Saudi Arabia its biggest sports win yet as host of the 2034 World Cup
item.description: Saudi Arabia will be confirmed by FIFA as host of the men’s soccer 2034 World Cup on Wednesday, giving the oil-rich kingdom its biggest prize yet for massive spending on global sports driven by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
item.dc:creator: Graham Dunbar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lanier scores 22 points as No. 1 Tennessee beats Miami 75-62 at Jimmy V Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chaz Lanier scored 22 points, and No. 1 Tennessee beat struggling Miami 75-62 on Tuesday night at the Jimmy V Classic in Madison Square Garden. Igor Milicic Jr.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Washington Nationals win lottery for first No. 1 overall draft pick since teen Bryce Harper in 2010
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Washington Nationals will have the No. 1 overall pick in the amateur draft for the first time since selecting a 17-year-old Bryce Harper in 2010.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor Swift invited Caitlin Clark to Chiefs game amid distance from Brittany Mahomes at suites this year
item.description: WNBA star Caitlin Clark says pop star Taylor Swift invited her to watch a Kansas City Chiefs game in an interview with Time magazine Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Sharks update: Multiple teams had interest in Blackwood before trade
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks welcome forward Nikolai Kovalenko and goalie Alexandar Georgiev after trade with Colorado Avalanche
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Athletes in $2.8 billion college lawsuit tell judge they want to create a players' association
item.description: The athletes whose lawsuit against the NCAA is primed to pave the way for schools to pay them directly also want a players' association to represent them in the complex contract negotiations that have overtaken the sport.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brotherly gripe? Eagles can fix any issues with one breakout passing game: Analysis
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ The Philadelphia Eagles have to make sure they don’t beat themselves. A nine-game winning streak helped the Eagles (11-2) clinch their fourth consecutive playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SHR closure leads to a seat shakeup in NASCAR. A look at who is driving where in 2025
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — There won't be a Stewart-Haas Racing in NASCAR next season now that Hall of Famer Tony Stewart has left the series and the four-car organization he co-owned with Formula 1 team owner Gene Haas.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings legend Kyle Rudolph on why it's 'really tough' to see Sam Darnold returning to Minnesota next season
item.description: Minnesota Vikings legend Kyle Rudolph loves what he's seen from Sam Darnold in his first year with the team, but he explains why it's tough to see him return.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets gave Juan Soto free suite for family while Yankees 'wouldn't budge' on doing the same: report
item.description: Details from Juan Soto's negotiations with the Mets and Yankees have come out, and the latter reportedly "wouldn't budge" on giving his family a free suite while the former said yes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Burrow believes Bengals can keep receiver Tee Higgins, and he's willing to help
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Joe Burrow says he's willing to do whatever he can to help the Cincinnati Bengals keep receiver Tee Higgins, who is set to be a free agent in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reports: White Sox sign former Cub Mike Tauchman
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Free agent outfielder Mike Tauchman is trading the North Side for the South Side, according to multiple reports. MLB.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Soto's record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets reverberates through Major League Baseball
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Shortly after striking a record $765 million, 15-year contract for Juan Soto with the New York Mets, agent Scott Boras walked into Nick & Sam's, a restaurant near the winter meetings hotel, with about a dozen of his staff.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM and STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
